Common.placeholderBody: This section will arrive in an upcoming update.

emailStep.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a sign-in code.

errors.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.requestFailed: We couldn't send the code. Try again.
errors.invalidCode: Wrong or expired code. Check it and try again.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

Onboarding.title: Choose your interests
Onboarding.subtitle: Pick the topics you care about to personalize your feed.
Onboarding.editSubtitle: Add or remove topics. Changes update your feed.

Account.exportError: We couldn't export your data. Try again.
Account.exportRateLimited: You can export your data once a day. Try again later.
Account.deleteMessage: This can't be undone. Your account will be deleted.
Account.deleteError: We couldn't delete your account. Try again.

AuthPrompt.title: Sign in to continue
AuthPrompt.description: Sign in to use this feature.
AuthPrompt.accountDescription: Sign in to see your account.
AuthPrompt.savedDescription: Sign in to see your reading lists.

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.authDescription: Sign in to see your notifications.
Notifications.emptyDescription: You're all caught up. New notifications will show up here.
Notifications.errorDescription: Something went wrong. Pull to refresh.

Search.emptyDescription: Try different words or another topic.

Feed.heading: Your feed
Feed.subheading: An ordered selection of what matters, with the source always visible. Tap a headline to read on the publisher.
Feed.modeAnonNote: Modes personalize the feed once you sign in. While signed out you see a neutral cold-start selection.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.help: A calibrated mix of recency, relevance and variety.

more_pluralism.label: More pluralism
more_pluralism.help: Broadens the range of sources and viewpoints.

most_personalized.label: Most personalized
most_personalized.help: Leans more on your interests and actions.

less_personalized.label: Less personalized
less_personalized.help: Reduces the weight of your profile for a wider view.

chronological.label: Chronological
chronological.help: In time order, with no algorithmic re-ranking.

why.intro: This item is ranked using several signals. Here's how much each one weighs.

topicMatch.label: Topic match
topicMatch.help: How well the topic fits your interests.

sourceDiversity.label: Source diversity
sourceDiversity.help: Favors a range of sources, avoiding concentration.

topicVariety.label: Topic variety
topicVariety.help: Keeps the feed varied, not a single subject.

clusterProminence.label: Story prominence
clusterProminence.help: How much the story stands out across sources.

list.errorDescription: Something went wrong. Please try again shortly.
list.emptyDescription: There's nothing to show right now. Check back later.
list.caughtUpDescription: You've seen everything we've selected for now. Check back later for more.

Lists.emptyDescription: Create a list to save articles.
Lists.emptyItemsDescription: Save articles to this list from the feed.

Mutes.title: Muted topics & sources
Mutes.emptyDescription: Topics and sources you hide will appear here.

Suggested.title: Widen your feed?
Suggested.subtitle: We noticed interest in these topics.

Stats.title: Stats
Stats.subtitle: The variety of your reading, from your actions.
Stats.emptyDescription: Read a few articles and your stats will show up here.
